description_long: This object is a modern Huawei mobile phone with a sleek, rectangular form and rounded corners. The front features a large, edge-to-edge display with a small notch at the top center, likely housing a front-facing camera. The screen displays a vibrant blue and purple abstract wallpaper, with the time and some notification icons visible. The phone's body appears to be made of black plastic or metal with a matte finish, and the Huawei logo is prominently displayed on the bottom front bezel. Physical buttons are visible along the right edge, likely for power and volume control. The device is slim and compact, typical of contemporary smartphones, and is designed for handheld use in urban environments.
description: A sleek Huawei smartphone with a large, vibrant display, black body, and visible front branding. The device features a modern design with a prominent screen and side buttons.
description_view_0: Front view showing the large display, Huawei logo on the bottom bezel, and the screen's colorful wallpaper.
description_view_1: Right-side view highlighting the slim profile and the presence of physical buttons along the edge.
description_view_2: Rear-angled front view emphasizing the screen, top notch, and the phone's rounded corners.
description_view_3: Left-side view showing the uninterrupted edge and the phone's thinness.
attribute_brand_logo: Huawei logo in white text, located on the bottom front bezel, clearly visible and centered.
attribute_screen_display_content: The screen displays a blue and purple abstract wallpaper, the time '08:08', and some small notification icons at the top.
attribute_camera_placement: A single front-facing camera is visible, centered in a small notch at the top of the display. No rear cameras are visible in these views.
attribute_button_layout: Physical buttons are present on the right edge, likely including a power button and a volume rocker.
